title: Camps * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Camps * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAMP KC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a week-long camp. Provides parental support, parent-child activities, social groups, and education materials. Camp activities may include swimming, arts and crafts, dance classes, nature hikes, and more. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Families with children ages 5-15 who are living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies by camp Email (503) 278-3812 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAMP KC
